title: Photonics Technicians
description: Build, install, test, or maintain optical or fiber optic equipment, such as lasers, lenses, or mirrors, using spectrometers, interferometers, or related equipment.

tasks.text: Compute or record photonic test data.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Maintain clean working environments, according to clean room standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust or maintain equipment, such as lasers, laser systems, microscopes, oscilloscopes, pulse generators, power meters, beam analyzers, or energy measurement devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Document procedures, such as calibration of optical or fiber optic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Set up or operate assembly or processing equipment, such as lasers, cameras, die bonders, wire bonders, dispensers, reflow ovens, soldering irons, die shears, wire pull testers, temperature or humidity chambers, or optical spectrum analyzers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assist scientists or engineers in the conduct of photonic experiments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test or perform failure analysis for optomechanical or optoelectrical products, according to test plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist engineers in the development of new products, fixtures, tools, or processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend optical or optic equipment design or material changes to reduce costs or processing times.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Set up or operate prototype or test apparatus, such as control consoles, collimators, recording equipment, or cables.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Monitor inventory levels and order supplies as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Assemble fiber optical, optoelectronic, or free-space optics components, subcomponents, assemblies, or subassemblies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Optimize photonic process parameters by making prototype or production devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Splice fibers, using fusion splicing or other techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Build prototype optomechanical devices for use in equipment such as aerial cameras, gun sights, or telescopes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Terminate, cure, polish, or test fiber cables with mechanical connectors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform diagnostic analyses of processing steps, using analytical or metrological tools, such as microscopy, profilometry, or ellipsometry devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble or adjust parts or related electrical units of prototypes to prepare for testing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or calibrate products, such as surgical lasers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, build, or modify fixtures used to assemble parts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble components of energy-efficient optical communications systems involving photonic switches, optical backplanes, or optoelectronic interfaces.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Lay out cutting lines for machining, using drafting tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Mix, pour, or use processing chemicals or gases according to safety standards or established operating procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fabricate devices, such as optoelectronic or semiconductor devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
